Package com.sunilos.p4.model

Class BaseModel<T extends BaseBean>

java.lang.Object
com.sunilos.p4.model.BaseModel<T>
Type Parameters:
T -
Direct Known Subclasses:
CollegeModel, CourseModel, EmployeeModel, FacultyModel, InsuranceModel, InterviewModel, MarksheetModel, ProductModel, RoleModel, StudentModel, SubjectModel, UserModel
public abstract class BaseModel<T extends BaseBean> extends Object
It contains generalized methods for a Model class. ï¿½All Model classes in the application must inherit BasModel class.
Author:
Deepak Vishwakarma

    • nextPK

      public Integer nextPK() throws DatabaseException
      Creates the next primary key of the table. A primary key is a unique auto-generated integer number that represents a non-business primary key.
      Returns:
      Throws:
      DatabaseException

      public List<T> search(T bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
